2603.29419.title: RAAP: Retrieval-Augmented Affordance Prediction with Cross-Image Action Alignment
2603.29419.paper_summary: Understanding object affordances is essential for enabling robots to perform purposeful and fine-grained interactions in diverse and unstructured environments. However, existing approaches either rely on retrieval, which is fragile due to sparsity and coverage gaps, or on large-scale models, which frequently mislocalize contact points and mispredict post-contact actions when applied to unseen categories, thereby hindering robust generalization. We introduce Retrieval-Augmented Affordance Prediction (RAAP), a framework that unifies affordance retrieval with alignment-based learning. By decoupling static contact localization and dynamic action direction, RAAP transfers contact points via dense correspondence and predicts action directions through a retrieval-augmented alignment model that consolidates multiple references with dual-weighted attention. Trained on compact subsets of DROID and HOI4D with as few as tens of samples per task, RAAP achieves consistent performance across unseen objects and categories, and enables zero-shot robotic manipulation in both simulation and the real world. Project website: https://github.com/SEU-VIPGroup/RAAP.
2603.29419.paper_summary_zh: 理解物體的可供性對於使機器人在多樣且非結構化的環境中執行有目的且細緻的互動至關重要。<lb/>然而，現有的方法要麼依賴於檢索，這因為稀疏性和覆蓋範圍的缺口而顯得脆弱，要麼依賴於大規模模型，這在應用於未見過的類別時，經常會錯誤定位接觸點並錯誤預測接觸後的行動，從而妨礙穩健的泛化。<lb/>我們提出了檢索增強可供性預測（RAAP），這是一個將可供性檢索與基於對齊的學習統一的框架。<lb/>通過解耦靜態接觸定位和動態行動方向，RAAP通過密集對應轉移接觸點，並通過一個檢索增強的對齊模型預測行動方向，該模型通過雙加權注意力整合多個參考。<lb/>在DROID和HOI4D的緊湊子集上訓練，每個任務僅需幾十個樣本，RAAP在未見物體和類別上實現了一致的性能，並使零樣本機器人操作在模擬和現實世界中均得以實現。<lb/>項目網站：https://github.com/SEU-VIPGroup/RAAP.
2603.29419.author: Qiyuan Zhuang et.al.
2603.29419.authors: Qiyuan Zhuang, He-Yang Xu, Yijun Wang, Xin-Yang Zhao, Yang-Yang Li, Xiu-Shen Wei
